---
title: "Freedom"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(dplyr)
library(forcats)
```

How do civil liberties and political rights vary across countries and regions, and how has global freedom changed over time?

```{r}
freedom <- readr::read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2022/2022-02-22/freedom.csv')

```
Cleaning Countries:
```{r}
freedom_df <- freedom |>
  mutate(country = case_when(
    
    country == "United States of America" ~ "USA",
    country == "Russian Federation" ~ "Russia",
    country == "Viet Nam" ~ "Vietnam",
    country == "Czechia" ~ "Czech Republic",
    country == "Republic of Korea" ~ "South Korea",
    country == "Democratic People's Republic of Korea" ~ "North Korea",
    country == "Iran (Islamic Republic of)" ~ "Iran",
    country == "Syrian Arab Republic" ~ "Syria",
    country == "United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland" ~ "UK",
    country == "Congo" ~ "Republic of Congo",
    country == "Cabo Verde" ~ "Cape Verde",
    country == "Eswatini" ~ "Swaziland",
    country == "Lao People's Democratic Republic" ~ "Laos",
    country == "Micronesia (Federated States of)" ~ "Micronesia",
    country == "United Republic of Tanzania" ~ "Tanzania",
    country == "Bolivia (Plurinational State of)" ~ "Bolivia",
    country == "Venezuela (Bolivarian Republic of)" ~ "Venezuela",
    country == "Brunei Darussalam" ~ "Brunei",
    country == "Saint Kitts and Nevis" ~ "Saint Kitts",
    country == "Saint Vincent and the Grenadines" ~ "Saint Vincent",
    country == "Trinidad and Tobago" ~ "Trinidad",
    country == "CÃƒÂ´te dÃ¢â‚¬â„¢Ivoire" ~ "Ivory Coast",
    country == "Republic of Moldova" ~ "Moldova",
    country == "Antigua and Barbuda" ~ "Antigua",
   
    
    TRUE ~ country
  ))
```

How is freedom status distributed across countries in 2020?

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(ggplot2)

freedom_2020 <- freedom_df |>
  filter(year == 2020)

world_map <- map_data("world")

world_joined <- left_join(world_map, freedom_2020, join_by(region == country))

ggplot(world_joined, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group, fill = Status)) +
  geom_polygon(color="white", linewidth=0.1) +
  theme_void() +
  labs(
    title= "Freedom Status by Country",
    fill="Status"
  )
```
Ideas:



How does political freedom differ across regions of the world 
-plots by region, bar charts , density plots, ggplotly

How are countries distributed across freedom categories



“How has global political freedom changed over time, and how does it differ across regions?”

Map (2020 snapshot) 
Line plot: global average freedom over time
Boxplot: freedom by region
Density plot: distribution of scores
Top/bottom countries ranking (lollipop)
